item.title: Brian Wilson
item.description: Genres: Baroque pop, sunshine pop, pop rock, psychedelic pop, progressive pop Scene: Hawthorne / Hollywood, California Era: 1962–2022 (primary period: 1963–1967) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The opening chord of “God Only Knows” (1966) — an A major with a suspended fourth dropping to a third over a b...

item.title: Muddy Waters
item.description: Genres: Chicago blues, Electric blues, Delta blues Scene: Chicago (Chess Records) Era: 1948–1958 (Chess peak); active to 1983 RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The voice is unhurried and half-spoken, sure of itself to the point of menace, a man stating his business and daring the room to disagree.

item.title: George Martin
item.description: Era: 1950s–1998 (primary period: 1962–1970) Genres: Pop rock, Merseybeat, psychedelic pop, art rock, baroque pop Key artists: The Beatles RYM · Apple Music · Spotify George Martin signed the Beatles because nobody else would, and the records they made together over the next eight years changed what ...

item.title: The Beach Boys
item.description: Genres: Surf rock, vocal surf, baroque pop, sunshine pop, psychedelic pop, progressive pop, pop rock Scene: Hawthorne / Hollywood, California Era: 1961–present (primary period: 1963–1970) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The Beach Boys’ public image (surfing, cars, California sunshine) bore almost no rel...

item.title: The Beatles
item.description: Genres: Pop rock, psychedelic pop, art rock Scene: Merseybeat Movement: British beat boom Era: The British Invasion (1963–1970) Playlist: FAB RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The Beatles are the axis around which twentieth-century popular music turns.

item.title: The Kinks
item.description: Genres: Pop rock, Mod, baroque pop, art rock Scene: Mod, North London Era: 1964–1996 (primary period: 1964–1970) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Dave Davies slashed his amplifier speaker with a razor blade and the sound that came out — a ragged, distorted roar underpinning the riff on “You Really Got Me...

item.title: The Who
item.description: Genres: Mod, freakbeat, art rock, hard rock, rock opera Scene: Mod, Shepherd’s Bush, London Era: 1964–present (primary period: 1965–1973) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Most drummers keep time.

item.title: Country blues
item.description: Blues | American folk music → Country blues Period: c. 1920s–1940s (recorded era); roots c.

item.title: Delta blues
item.description: Blues → Country blues → Delta blues Period: c. 1920s–1940s (recorded era); roots c.
